issues: Missing recommendation_block field - must be a formatted string (not nested object) with header separator, title, keyword scores, recommended resume type, confidence score, top signals, and explanation
CSV code is '003' but should be 'AI' (the recommended resume type) - format must be Company,Title,Career Ops,,,,RESUME_CODE
No job_id field required in output (remove it)
recommendation object is structured wrong - convert it to a single recommendation_block string matching apply.md format
message:
Please fix the following issues and rewrite 003-output.json:
1. Format recommendation object into a single recommendation_block string
2. Fix CSV code from '003' to 'AI' (the recommended resume)
3. Remove job_id field from output root
4. Add resume_code field with value 'AI'
5. Keep all 8 recommendation sections: header, title, scores, recommended, confidence, signals, why, footer
